message:
feat(abi): expand ABI surface for math functions, string operations, and runtime policy

Extends the glibc-rs-abi crate's C-compatible ABI layer:

- math_abi.rs: +212 lines exporting new math functions through the C ABI with
  proper symbol versioning annotations (exp2, expm1, ldexp, frexp, modf,
  fpclassify, tgamma, lgamma, erf, erfc, Bessel family, inverse trig,
  hyperbolic functions)
- string_abi.rs: +506 lines adding string/memory ABI exports (memcpy, memmove,
  memset, memcmp, memchr, strlen, strnlen, strcpy, strncpy, strcat, strncat,
  strcmp, strncmp, strchr, strrchr, strstr, strtok, strerror) with proper
  null-pointer safety checks via the membrane layer
- runtime_policy.rs: +20 lines adding policy configuration for new function
  families (string validation depth, math precision modes)
- libc.map: +21 new symbol version entries for GLIBC_2.x compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
